core_principle: Every account represents one real human being.
sponsor_responsibility: I reasonably believe this person is who they claim to be — not a guarantee of every future action.
sponsor_agreement_text: I personally know this individual or have verified their identity sufficiently to believe they are who they claim to be.
real_name_policy: The default identity is the name you are publicly known by — not anonymous handles.
constitutional_principles: One Human · One Identity · One Accountability Chain
There is only ONE way to enter the platform: Invitation
Identity is built through trust, not passwords
Trust grows over time — it is never purchased
Verification protects the community — it does not exclude people
Every important action is attributable to a real human
